description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark wooden handle with a gentle curve, designed for ergonomic grip and control. The axe head is made of black metal, with a broad, slightly curved cutting edge and a pronounced beard, giving it a traditional yet functional appearance. The blade is securely mounted to the handle with a visible metal collar or pin at the top, suggesting a classic wedged attachment. The handle's surface appears smooth but matte, with no visible grip texturing or wrapping. The axe head is solid and thick, with a flat poll opposite the cutting edge, suitable for light hammering tasks. No visible markings, engravings, or brand labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A traditional hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, black metal blade, featuring a wedged mounting and no visible markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the axe, with the blade edge pointing forward and the handle aligned vertically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved wooden handle and the full expanse of the black metal blade, including the beard and poll.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle, with the poll visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other face of the blade and the handle's curvature, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle, smooth finish, oval cross-section, no additional grip features, ergonomic traditional style.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a curved cutting edge, pronounced beard, flat poll, and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible metal collar or pin securing the blade to the handle.
